window_reduction_categories.reduction_logic: Slot 1 = full rate (divide by 1), slots 2-10 = 50% of rate (divide by 2)
Slot 1 = full rate (divide by 1), slots 2-10 = 50% of rate (divide by 2)
Slot 1 = full PT/OT/ST rate (LEAD offset 0), slots 2-10 = Therapy_MP * PT/OT/ST (RVU-weighted reduction factor)

insertion_plan.description: DROP TABLE safety lines for #LineBreakdown in the cleanup block at the top of the script
insertion_plan.anchor_snippet: IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#StepFinal') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #StepFinal
insertion_plan.sql: IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#LineBreakdown') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #LineBreakdown

insertion_plan.description: CTE bRanked (ROW_NUMBER ranks for all MAX categories plus WINDOW_REDUCTION slot ranks) + CTE bSlots (rank-1 pivot rows for RD, RDC, Therapy slots) + SELECT DISTINCT INTO #LineBreakdown with ServiceCategory, PricingMethod, LinePayment, BundledByNCCI
insertion_plan.sql:
--======================================================================
-- *** [PRICE BREAKDOWN - INSERTED SECTION] ***
-- PURPOSE : Produce a LINE-LEVEL price breakdown for auditor review.
--           One row per charge line (EncounterID + Sequence + ProcedureCode).
--
-- SOURCE  : #Step3Bundle (post-NCCI bundling, pre-hierarchy)
--           joined to #Step4 (encounter-level post-hierarchy suppression)
--
-- MAX CATEGORIES (only the highest-value line per encounter pays):
--   ER, AS, Minor_Surgery, Endoscopy, Laparoscopy, Cardiac_Cath,
--   Cardiac_Cath_Injection, PTCA, Lithotripsy, Lithotripsy_Injection,
--   Gamma_Knife, Hip_Knee_Replacement, Shoulder_Replacement, Clinic
--
-- SUM CATEGORIES (all matching lines pay):
--   OP_Default, Vascular_Angioplasty, Cardiac_Services, Implants, Blood,
--   Blood_Processing, Drugs, IV_Therapy, Chemotherapy, Lab, Radiation_Therapy,
--   IOP, Psych, ECT, Miscellaneous, Sleep_Studies
--
-- WINDOW_REDUCTION CATEGORIES (slot-based payment via LEAD pivot):
--   Radiology/MRI/CT_Scan_Reduction  (RD1-RD10)
--   MRI/CT_Reduction                 (RDC1-RDC10)
--   PT/OT/ST / Therapy               (Therapy1-Therapy10)
--   NoReduction variants             (Radiology/MRI/CT_Scan_NoReduction, MRI/CT_noReduction) - SUM
--
-- SUPPRESSION HIERARCHY (tier 1 = highest priority, from #Step4 IIF chain):
--   1. Gamma_Knife
--   2. Shoulder_Replacement      (suppressed if Gamma_Knife != 0)
--   3. Hip_Knee_Replacement      (suppressed if Gamma_Knife OR Shoulder != 0)
--   4. PTCA                      (suppressed if Gamma_Knife OR Shoulder OR HipKnee != 0)
--   5. Lithotripsy               (suppressed if Gamma_Knife OR Shoulder OR HipKnee OR PTCA != 0)
--   6. Laparoscopy               (suppressed if tiers 1-5 != 0)
--   7. Cardiac_Cath              (suppressed if Laparoscopy OR tiers 1-5 != 0)
--   8. Minor_Surgery             (suppressed if Laparoscopy OR Cardiac_Cath OR tiers 1-5 != 0)
--   9. Endoscopy                 (suppressed if Laparoscopy OR tiers 1-8 != 0)
--  10. AS                        (suppressed if Laparoscopy OR tiers 1-9 != 0)
--  11. ER                        (suppressed if Laparoscopy OR tiers 1-10 != 0)
--  12. Psych / ECT / IOP         (suppressed if Laparoscopy OR tiers 1-11 != 0)
--  13. Vascular_Angioplasty / Lab / Radiation_Therapy / PT/OT/ST /
--      Cardiac_Services / Chemotherapy / Sleep_Studies / IV_Therapy /
--      Miscellaneous / Clinic    (suppressed by tiers 1-12)
--  Special: Drugs / Blood / Blood_Processing suppressed by any surgical or ER tier.
--           Implants: complex CASE - Implant_V2790+implant_C1713 special handling.
--           Radiology: suppressed by ER_Check and surgical tiers per #Step4.
--           OP_Default: suppressed if PT/OT/ST or any named category != 0.
--======================================================================
;WITH bRanked AS (
    SELECT *
        -- MAX category ranks
        , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [EncounterID] ORDER BY [ER]                   DESC, [Amount] DESC, [Sequence] ASC) AS rn_ER
        , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [EncounterID] ORDER BY [AS]                   DESC, [Amount] DESC, [Sequence] ASC) AS rn_AS
        , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [EncounterID] ORDER BY [Minor_Surgery]        DESC, [Amount] DESC, [Sequence] ASC) AS rn_MinorSurg
        , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [EncounterID] ORDER BY [Endoscopy]            DESC, [Amount] DESC, [Sequence] ASC) AS rn_Endoscopy
        , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [EncounterID] ORDER BY [Laparoscopy]          DESC, [Amount] DESC, [Sequence] ASC) AS rn_Laparoscopy
        , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [EncounterID] ORDER BY [Cardiac_Cath]         DESC, [Amount] DESC, [Sequence] ASC) AS rn_CardiacCath
        , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [EncounterID] ORDER BY [Cardiac_Cath_Injection] DESC, [Amount] DESC, [Sequence] ASC) AS rn_CCathInj
        , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [EncounterID] ORDER BY [PTCA]                 DESC, [Amount] DESC, [Sequence] ASC) AS rn_PTCA
        , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [EncounterID] ORDER BY [Lithotripsy]          DESC, [Amount] DESC, [Sequence] ASC) AS rn_Lithotripsy
        , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [EncounterID] ORDER BY [Lithotripsy_Injection] DESC, [Amount] DESC, [Sequence] ASC) AS rn_LithoInj
        , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [EncounterID] ORDER BY [Gamma_Knife]          DESC, [Amount] DESC, [Sequence] ASC) AS rn_GammaKnife
        , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [EncounterID] ORDER BY [Hip_Knee_Replacement] DESC, [Amount] DESC, [Sequence] ASC) AS rn_HipKnee
        , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [EncounterID] ORDER BY [Shoulder_Replacement] DESC, [Amount] DESC, [Sequence] ASC) AS rn_Shoulder
        , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [EncounterID] ORDER BY [Clinic]               DESC, [Amount] DESC, [Sequence] ASC) AS rn_Clinic
        -- WINDOW_REDUCTION ranks: rn maps to slot number on the rank-1 pivot row
        -- Therapy: rank ordered by Therapy1 DESC (= the row's own PT/OT/ST value, slot 1)
        , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [EncounterID] ORDER BY Therapy1               DESC, [Amount] DESC, [Sequence] ASC) AS rn_Therapy
        -- Radiology: rank ordered by RD1 DESC (= the row's own Radiology/MRI/CT_Scan_Reduction value)
        , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [EncounterID] ORDER BY RD1                    DESC, [Amount] DESC, [Sequence] ASC) AS rn_RD
        -- MRI/CT: rank ordered by RDC1 DESC (= the row's own MRI/CT_Reduction value)
        , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY [EncounterID] ORDER BY RDC1                   DESC, [Amount] DESC, [Sequence] ASC) AS rn_RDC
    FROM #Step3Bundle
)
-- bSlots: one row per encounter (the rank-1 pivot row) holding all LEAD slot values.
-- Each non-rank-1 row looks up its payment from the rank-1 row's corresponding slot.
, bSlots AS (
    SELECT
        [EncounterID]
        , RD1,  RD2,  RD3,  RD4,  RD5,  RD6,  RD7,  RD8,  RD9,  RD10
        , RDC1, RDC2, RDC3, RDC4, RDC5, RDC6, RDC7, RDC8, RDC9, RDC10
        , Therapy1, Therapy2, Therapy3, Therapy4, Therapy5
        , Therapy6, Therapy7, Therapy8, Therapy9, Therapy10
    FROM bRanked
    WHERE rn_RD      = 1
       OR rn_RDC     = 1
       OR rn_Therapy = 1
)
SELECT DISTINCT
    b.[EncounterID]
    , b.[Sequence]
    , b.[ProcedureCode]
    , b.[RevenueCode]
    , b.[ServiceDate]
    , b.[Amount]                                        AS [BilledAmount]
    , b.[Quantity]

    -- SERVICE CATEGORY
    -- Hierarchy order mirrors #Step4 IIF chain exactly.
    -- MAX categories: '_Non_Winner' suffix when line matched but rank > 1.
    -- SUM categories: labeled if category survived hierarchy AND line matched.
    -- WINDOW_REDUCTION: slot-based label.
    -- 'Suppressed_By_Hierarchy': line matched something but encounter hierarchy zeroed it.
    , [ServiceCategory] = CASE
        -- Tier 1
        WHEN s4.[Gamma_Knife]            != 0 AND b.[Gamma_Knife]            > 0 THEN IIF(b.rn_GammaKnife  = 1, 'Gamma_Knife',                   'Gamma_Knife_Non_Winner')
        -- Tier 2
        WHEN s4.[Shoulder_Replacement]   != 0 AND b.[Shoulder_Replacement]   > 0 THEN IIF(b.rn_Shoulder    = 1, 'Shoulder_Replacement',            'Shoulder_Replacement_Non_Winner')
        -- Tier 3
        WHEN s4.[Hip_Knee_Replacement]   != 0 AND b.[Hip_Knee_Replacement]   > 0 THEN IIF(b.rn_HipKnee     = 1, 'Hip_Knee_Replacement',            'Hip_Knee_Replacement_Non_Winner')
        -- Tier 4
        WHEN s4.[PTCA]                   != 0 AND b.[PTCA]                   > 0 THEN IIF(b.rn_PTCA         = 1, 'PTCA',                            'PTCA_Non_Winner')
        -- Tier 5
        WHEN s4.[Lithotripsy]            != 0 AND b.[Lithotripsy]            > 0 THEN IIF(b.rn_Lithotripsy  = 1, 'Lithotripsy',                     'Lithotripsy_Non_Winner')
        -- Tier 6
        WHEN s4.[Laparoscopy]            != 0 AND b.[Laparoscopy]            > 0 THEN IIF(b.rn_Laparoscopy  = 1, 'Laparoscopy',                     'Laparoscopy_Non_Winner')
        -- Tier 7
        WHEN s4.[Cardiac_Cath]           != 0 AND b.[Cardiac_Cath]           > 0 THEN IIF(b.rn_CardiacCath  = 1, 'Cardiac_Cath',                    'Cardiac_Cath_Non_Winner')
        -- Tier 8
        WHEN s4.[Minor_Surgery]          != 0 AND b.[Minor_Surgery]          > 0 THEN IIF(b.rn_MinorSurg    = 1, 'Minor_Surgery',                    'Minor_Surgery_Non_Winner')
        -- Tier 9
        WHEN s4.[Endoscopy]              != 0 AND b.[Endoscopy]              > 0 THEN IIF(b.rn_Endoscopy    = 1, 'Endoscopy',                        'Endoscopy_Non_Winner')
        -- Tier 10
        WHEN s4.[AS]                     != 0 AND b.[AS]                     > 0 THEN IIF(b.rn_AS            = 1, 'Ambulatory_Surgery',              'Ambulatory_Surgery_Non_Winner')
        -- Tier 11
        WHEN s4.[ER]                     != 0 AND b.[ER]                     > 0 THEN IIF(b.rn_ER            = 1, 'ER',                              'ER_Non_Winner')
        -- Tier 12
        WHEN s4.[Psych]                  != 0 AND b.[Psych]                  > 0 THEN 'Psych'
        WHEN s4.[ECT]                    != 0 AND b.[ECT]                    > 0 THEN 'ECT'
        WHEN s4.[IOP]                    != 0 AND b.[IOP]                    > 0 THEN 'IOP'
        -- Injection add-ons (paid alongside parent)
        WHEN s4.[Cardiac_Cath_Injection] != 0 AND b.[Cardiac_Cath_Injection] > 0 THEN IIF(b.rn_CCathInj     = 1, 'Cardiac_Cath_Injection',          'Cardiac_Cath_Injection_Non_Winner')
        WHEN s4.[Lithotripsy_Injection]  != 0 AND b.[Lithotripsy_Injection]  > 0 THEN IIF(b.rn_LithoInj     = 1, 'Lithotripsy_Injection',           'Lithotripsy_Injection_Non_Winner')
        -- Tier 13 SUM categories
        WHEN s4.[Vascular_Angioplasty]   != 0 AND b.[Vascular_Angioplasty]   > 0 THEN 'Vascular_Angioplasty'
        WHEN s4.[Lab]                    != 0 AND b.[Lab]                    > 0 THEN 'Lab'
        WHEN s4.[Radiation_Therapy]      != 0 AND b.[Radiation_Therapy]      > 0 THEN 'Radiation_Therapy'
        -- PT/OT/ST Therapy window reduction
        WHEN s4.[PT/OT/ST]               != 0
          AND (ISNULL(b.Therapy1,0)+ISNULL(b.Therapy2,0)+ISNULL(b.Therapy3,0)+ISNULL(b.Therapy4,0)+ISNULL(b.Therapy5,0)
             + ISNULL(b.Therapy6,0)+ISNULL(b.Therapy7,0)+ISNULL(b.Therapy8,0)+ISNULL(b.Therapy9,0)+ISNULL(b.Therapy10,0)) > 0
            THEN CASE
                    WHEN b.rn_Therapy = 1                    THEN 'PT_OT_ST_Slot1_FullRate'
                    WHEN b.rn_Therapy BETWEEN 2 AND 10       THEN 'PT_OT_ST_Reduction'
                    ELSE                                          'PT_OT_ST_Beyond_Max'
                 END
        WHEN s4.[Cardiac_Services]       != 0 AND b.[Cardiac_Services]       > 0 THEN 'Cardiac_Services'
        WHEN s4.[Chemotherapy]           != 0 AND b.[Chemotherapy]           > 0 THEN 'Chemotherapy'
        WHEN s4.[Sleep_Studies]          != 0 AND b.[Sleep_Studies]          > 0 THEN 'Sleep_Studies'
        WHEN s4.[IV_Therapy]             != 0 AND b.[IV_Therapy]             > 0 THEN 'IV_Therapy'
        WHEN s4.[Miscellaneous]          != 0 AND b.[Miscellaneous]          > 0 THEN 'Miscellaneous'
        WHEN s4.[Clinic]                 != 0 AND b.[Clinic]                 > 0 THEN IIF(b.rn_Clinic = 1, 'Clinic', 'Clinic_Non_Winner')
        -- Drugs / Blood / Blood_Processing special suppression
        WHEN s4.[Drugs]                  != 0 AND b.[Drugs]                  > 0 THEN 'Drugs'
        WHEN s4.[Implants]               != 0 AND b.[Implants]               > 0 THEN 'Implants'
        WHEN s4.[Blood]                  != 0 AND b.[Blood]                  > 0 THEN 'Blood'
        WHEN s4.[Blood_Processing]       != 0 AND b.[Blood_Processing]       > 0 THEN 'Blood_Processing'
        -- Radiology/MRI/CT window reduction categories
        WHEN (ISNULL(s4.[Radiology/MRI/CT_Scan_Reduction],0) + ISNULL(s4.[Radiology/MRI/CT_Scan_NoReduction],0)
            + ISNULL(s4.[MRI/CT_Reduction],0) + ISNULL(s4.[MRI/CT_noReduction],0)) != 0
          AND (ISNULL(b.RD1,0)+ISNULL(b.RD2,0)+ISNULL(b.RD3,0)+ISNULL(b.RD4,0)+ISNULL(b.RD5,0)
             + ISNULL(b.RD6,0)+ISNULL(b.RD7,0)+ISNULL(b.RD8,0)+ISNULL(b.RD9,0)+ISNULL(b.RD10,0)
             + ISNULL(b.[Radiology/MRI/CT_Scan_NoReduction],0)
             + ISNULL(b.RDC1,0)+ISNULL(b.RDC2,0)+ISNULL(b.RDC3,0)+ISNULL(b.RDC4,0)+ISNULL(b.RDC5,0)
             + ISNULL(b.RDC6,0)+ISNULL(b.RDC7,0)+ISNULL(b.RDC8,0)+ISNULL(b.RDC9,0)+ISNULL(b.RDC10,0)
             + ISNULL(b.[MRI/CT_noReduction],0)) > 0
            THEN CASE
                    WHEN ISNULL(b.[Radiology/MRI/CT_Scan_NoReduction],0) > 0
                      OR ISNULL(b.[MRI/CT_noReduction],0) > 0              THEN 'Radiology_MRI_CT_NoReduction'
                    WHEN b.rn_RD  BETWEEN 1 AND 10                          THEN 'Radiology_MRI_CT_Reduction'
                    WHEN b.rn_RDC BETWEEN 1 AND 10                          THEN 'MRI_CT_Reduction'
                    ELSE                                                         'Radiology_MRI_CT_Beyond_Max'
                 END
        -- OP_Default catch-all
        WHEN s4.[OP_Default]             != 0 AND b.[OP_Default]             > 0 THEN 'OP_Default'
        -- Line matched a category but encounter hierarchy zeroed it
        WHEN (ISNULL(b.[ER],0)+ISNULL(b.[AS],0)+ISNULL(b.[Minor_Surgery],0)+ISNULL(b.[Endoscopy],0)
            + ISNULL(b.[Laparoscopy],0)+ISNULL(b.[Cardiac_Cath],0)+ISNULL(b.[PTCA],0)
            + ISNULL(b.[Gamma_Knife],0)+ISNULL(b.[Hip_Knee_Replacement],0)+ISNULL(b.[Shoulder_Replacement],0)
            + ISNULL(b.[Lithotripsy],0)+ISNULL(b.[Vascular_Angioplasty],0)+ISNULL(b.[Cardiac_Services],0)
            + ISNULL(b.[Drugs],0)+ISNULL(b.[Implants],0)+ISNULL(b.[Blood],0)+ISNULL(b.[Blood_Processing],0)
            + ISNULL(b.[Chemotherapy],0)+ISNULL(b.[Lab],0)+ISNULL(b.[Radiation_Therapy],0)
            + ISNULL(b.Therapy1,0)+ISNULL(b.[IOP],0)+ISNULL(b.[Psych],0)+ISNULL(b.[ECT],0)
            + ISNULL(b.[Miscellaneous],0)+ISNULL(b.[Sleep_Studies],0)+ISNULL(b.[Clinic],0)
            + ISNULL(b.[IV_Therapy],0)+ISNULL(b.[OP_Default],0)
            + ISNULL(b.RD1,0)+ISNULL(b.RD2,0)+ISNULL(b.RD3,0)+ISNULL(b.RD4,0)+ISNULL(b.RD5,0)
            + ISNULL(b.RD6,0)+ISNULL(b.RD7,0)+ISNULL(b.RD8,0)+ISNULL(b.RD9,0)+ISNULL(b.RD10,0)
            + ISNULL(b.[Radiology/MRI/CT_Scan_NoReduction],0)
            + ISNULL(b.RDC1,0)+ISNULL(b.RDC2,0)+ISNULL(b.RDC3,0)+ISNULL(b.RDC4,0)+ISNULL(b.RDC5,0)
            + ISNULL(b.RDC6,0)+ISNULL(b.RDC7,0)+ISNULL(b.RDC8,0)+ISNULL(b.RDC9,0)+ISNULL(b.RDC10,0)
            + ISNULL(b.[MRI/CT_noReduction],0)
            + ISNULL(b.[Cardiac_Cath_Injection],0)+ISNULL(b.[Lithotripsy_Injection],0)) > 0
                                                                              THEN 'Suppressed_By_Hierarchy'
        ELSE 'No_Payment_Category'
      END

    -- PRICING METHOD
    , [PricingMethod] = CASE
        WHEN s4.[Gamma_Knife]            != 0 AND b.[Gamma_Knife]            > 0 THEN 'Contracted flat rate per contract period (Gamma Knife CPT list: G0339/G0340/61796-61800/63620/63621)'
        WHEN s4.[Shoulder_Replacement]   != 0 AND b.[Shoulder_Replacement]   > 0 THEN 'Contracted flat rate per contract period (Shoulder CPT list: 23470/23472-23474)'
        WHEN s4.[Hip_Knee_Replacement]   != 0 AND b.[Hip_Knee_Replacement]   > 0 THEN 'Contracted flat rate per contract period (Hip/Knee CPT list: 27130/27132/27437-27447)'
        WHEN s4.[PTCA]                   != 0 AND b.[PTCA]                   > 0 THEN 'Contracted flat rate per contract period (PTCA CPT list: 92920-92944/C9600-C9608)'
        WHEN s4.[Lithotripsy]            != 0 AND b.[Lithotripsy]            > 0 THEN 'Contracted flat rate per contract period (CPT 50590 only)'
        WHEN s4.[Laparoscopy]            != 0 AND b.[Laparoscopy]            > 0 THEN 'Contracted flat rate per contract period (Laparoscopy CPT list)'
        WHEN s4.[Cardiac_Cath]           != 0 AND b.[Cardiac_Cath]           > 0 THEN 'Contracted flat rate per contract period (Cardiac Cath CPT list: 93451-93592 and related)'
        WHEN s4.[Minor_Surgery]          != 0 AND b.[Minor_Surgery]          > 0 THEN 'Contracted flat rate per contract period (Minor Surgery CPT list)'
        WHEN s4.[Endoscopy]              != 0 AND b.[Endoscopy]              > 0 THEN 'Contracted flat rate per contract period (Endoscopy CPT ranges: 31615-31651/43191-43278/44360-44408/45300-45398)'
        WHEN s4.[AS]                     != 0 AND b.[AS]                     > 0 THEN 'Contracted flat rate per contract period (Ambulatory Surgery Rev 36x/49x/75x/79x/480/481 + Aetna AS CPT list)'
        WHEN s4.[ER]                     != 0 AND b.[ER]                     > 0 THEN 'Contracted flat rate per contract period (ER Rev 450/451/452/456/459)'
        WHEN s4.[Psych]                  != 0 AND b.[Psych]                  > 0 THEN 'Contracted per diem x Quantity (Rev 912/913)'
        WHEN s4.[ECT]                    != 0 AND b.[ECT]                    > 0 THEN 'Contracted flat rate x Quantity per contract period (Rev 901, CPT 90870)'
        WHEN s4.[IOP]                    != 0 AND b.[IOP]                    > 0 THEN 'Contracted per diem x Quantity (Rev 905/906)'
        WHEN s4.[Cardiac_Cath_Injection] != 0 AND b.[Cardiac_Cath_Injection] > 0 THEN 'Hardcoded $0 (Cardiac_Cath_Injection = 0 in LINE_PRICING)'
        WHEN s4.[Lithotripsy_Injection]  != 0 AND b.[Lithotripsy_Injection]  > 0 THEN 'Hardcoded $0 (Lithotripsy_Injection = 0 in LINE_PRICING)'
        WHEN s4.[Vascular_Angioplasty]   != 0 AND b.[Vascular_Angioplasty]   > 0 THEN 'Pct of charges: Amount x 74.1% (CPT range 93880-93998)'
        WHEN s4.[Lab]                    != 0 AND b.[Lab]                    > 0 THEN 'Medicare Lab Fee Schedule x period multiplier (LAB1 rate) or RBRVS rate (LAB2) x multiplier; fallback = $0'
        WHEN s4.[Radiation_Therapy]      != 0 AND b.[Radiation_Therapy]      > 0 THEN 'Pct of charges: Amount x 74.1% (Rev 331/332/333/335 and radiopharmaceutical CPTs)'
        WHEN s4.[PT/OT/ST]               != 0
          AND (ISNULL(b.Therapy1,0)+ISNULL(b.Therapy2,0)+ISNULL(b.Therapy3,0)+ISNULL(b.Therapy4,0)+ISNULL(b.Therapy5,0)
             + ISNULL(b.Therapy6,0)+ISNULL(b.Therapy7,0)+ISNULL(b.Therapy8,0)+ISNULL(b.Therapy9,0)+ISNULL(b.Therapy10,0)) > 0
            THEN 'Pct of charges x 74.1% with Multiple Procedure RVU reduction factor (97xxx/9250x range); slot 1 = full rate, slots 2-10 = Therapy_MP weighted reduction'
        WHEN s4.[Cardiac_Services]       != 0 AND b.[Cardiac_Services]       > 0 THEN 'Pct of charges: Amount x 74.1% (CPT range 93000-93354 and cardiac codes)'
        WHEN s4.[Chemotherapy]           != 0 AND b.[Chemotherapy]           > 0 THEN 'Pct of charges: Amount x 74.1% (CPT 96401-96542, Q0083-Q0085, 51720)'
        WHEN s4.[Sleep_Studies]          != 0 AND b.[Sleep_Studies]          > 0 THEN 'Pct of charges: Amount x 74.1% (Sleep Study CPT list: 95782-95811/G0398-G0400)'
        WHEN s4.[IV_Therapy]             != 0 AND b.[IV_Therapy]             > 0 THEN 'Hardcoded $0 (IV_Therapy = 0 in LINE_PRICING)'
        WHEN s4.[Miscellaneous]          != 0 AND b.[Miscellaneous]          > 0 THEN 'Contracted flat rate x Quantity OR pct-of-charges x 74.1% (Behavioral Health / Misc CPT list)'
        WHEN s4.[Clinic]                 != 0 AND b.[Clinic]                 > 0 THEN 'Rev 510-529 — $0.01 flat per line under current contract terms'
        WHEN s4.[Drugs]                  != 0 AND b.[Drugs]                  > 0 THEN 'Aetna Market Fee Schedule x period multiplier (2.16/2.30/2.40/2.53/2.68); fallback = Amount x 29% (Rev 634/635/636, Drugs CPT table; excl Modifier FB)'
        WHEN s4.[Implants]               != 0 AND b.[Implants]               > 0 THEN 'Pct of charges: Amount x 36% (Rev 274/275/276/278, incl V2790/C1713 special handling; excl device pass-through codes)'
        WHEN s4.[Blood]                  != 0 AND b.[Blood]                  > 0 THEN 'Pct of charges: Amount x 82% (Rev 380-389)'
        WHEN s4.[Blood_Processing]       != 0 AND b.[Blood_Processing]       > 0 THEN 'Pct of charges: Amount x 74.1% (Rev 390/391/399)'
        WHEN (ISNULL(s4.[Radiology/MRI/CT_Scan_Reduction],0) + ISNULL(s4.[Radiology/MRI/CT_Scan_NoReduction],0)
            + ISNULL(s4.[MRI/CT_Reduction],0) + ISNULL(s4.[MRI/CT_noReduction],0)) != 0
          AND (ISNULL(b.RD1,0)+ISNULL(b.RD2,0)+ISNULL(b.RD3,0)+ISNULL(b.RD4,0)+ISNULL(b.RD5,0)
             + ISNULL(b.RD6,0)+ISNULL(b.RD7,0)+ISNULL(b.RD8,0)+ISNULL(b.RD9,0)+ISNULL(b.RD10,0)
             + ISNULL(b.[Radiology/MRI/CT_Scan_NoReduction],0)
             + ISNULL(b.RDC1,0)+ISNULL(b.RDC2,0)+ISNULL(b.RDC3,0)+ISNULL(b.RDC4,0)+ISNULL(b.RDC5,0)
             + ISNULL(b.RDC6,0)+ISNULL(b.RDC7,0)+ISNULL(b.RDC8,0)+ISNULL(b.RDC9,0)+ISNULL(b.RDC10,0)
             + ISNULL(b.[MRI/CT_noReduction],0)) > 0
            THEN CASE
                    WHEN ISNULL(b.[Radiology/MRI/CT_Scan_NoReduction],0) > 0
                      OR ISNULL(b.[MRI/CT_noReduction],0) > 0  THEN 'Pct of charges: Amount x 74.1% — No multiple-procedure reduction (MULT PROC not 4 and BILATSURG not 1)'
                    WHEN b.rn_RD = 1 OR b.rn_RDC = 1           THEN 'Pct of charges: Amount x 74.1% — 1st procedure, full rate (MULT PROC=4 or BILATSURG=1)'
                    WHEN b.rn_RD BETWEEN 2 AND 10
                      OR b.rn_RDC BETWEEN 2 AND 10              THEN 'Pct of charges: Amount x 74.1% then x 50% — 2nd+ procedure reduction (MULT PROC=4 or BILATSURG=1)'
                    ELSE                                             'Beyond 10th procedure in encounter — $0'
                 END
        WHEN s4.[OP_Default]             != 0 AND b.[OP_Default]             > 0 THEN 'Pct of charges: Amount x 74.1% — OP Default catch-all'
        ELSE 'Category suppressed by encounter hierarchy or no pattern matched — $0'
      END

    -- LINE PAYMENT
    -- MAX categories: IIF(rank=1, value, 0)
    -- SUM categories: IIF(s4 category survived, value, 0)
    -- WINDOW_REDUCTION: slot lookup from bSlots pivot row
    , [LinePayment] = ROUND(
          IIF(s4.[Gamma_Knife]            != 0, IIF(b.rn_GammaKnife  = 1, ISNULL(b.[Gamma_Knife], 0),            0), 0)
        + IIF(s4.[Shoulder_Replacement]   != 0, IIF(b.rn_Shoulder    = 1, ISNULL(b.[Shoulder_Replacement], 0),   0), 0)
        + IIF(s4.[Hip_Knee_Replacement]   != 0, IIF(b.rn_HipKnee     = 1, ISNULL(b.[Hip_Knee_Replacement], 0),  0), 0)
        + IIF(s4.[PTCA]                   != 0, IIF(b.rn_PTCA         = 1, ISNULL(b.[PTCA], 0),                  0), 0)
        + IIF(s4.[Lithotripsy]            != 0, IIF(b.rn_Lithotripsy  = 1, ISNULL(b.[Lithotripsy], 0),           0), 0)
        + IIF(s4.[Laparoscopy]            != 0, IIF(b.rn_Laparoscopy  = 1, ISNULL(b.[Laparoscopy], 0),           0), 0)
        + IIF(s4.[Cardiac_Cath]           != 0, IIF(b.rn_CardiacCath  = 1, ISNULL(b.[Cardiac_Cath], 0),          0), 0)
        + IIF(s4.[Cardiac_Cath_Injection] != 0, IIF(b.rn_CCathInj    = 1, ISNULL(b.[Cardiac_Cath_Injection], 0), 0), 0)
        + IIF(s4.[Minor_Surgery]          != 0, IIF(b.rn_MinorSurg    = 1, ISNULL(b.[Minor_Surgery], 0),          0), 0)
        + IIF(s4.[Endoscopy]              != 0, IIF(b.rn_Endoscopy    = 1, ISNULL(b.[Endoscopy], 0),              0), 0)
        + IIF(s4.[AS]                     != 0, IIF(b.rn_AS            = 1, ISNULL(b.[AS], 0),                    0), 0)
        + IIF(s4.[ER]                     != 0, IIF(b.rn_ER            = 1, ISNULL(b.[ER], 0),                    0), 0)
        + IIF(s4.[Lithotripsy_Injection]  != 0, IIF(b.rn_LithoInj    = 1, ISNULL(b.[Lithotripsy_Injection], 0),  0), 0)
        + IIF(s4.[Clinic]                 != 0, IIF(b.rn_Clinic        = 1, ISNULL(b.[Clinic], 0),                0), 0)
        -- SUM categories
        + IIF(s4.[Psych]                  != 0, ISNULL(b.[Psych], 0),                  0)
        + IIF(s4.[ECT]                    != 0, ISNULL(b.[ECT], 0),                    0)
        + IIF(s4.[IOP]                    != 0, ISNULL(b.[IOP], 0),                    0)
        + IIF(s4.[Vascular_Angioplasty]   != 0, ISNULL(b.[Vascular_Angioplasty], 0),  0)
        + IIF(s4.[Lab]                    != 0, ISNULL(b.[Lab], 0),                    0)
        + IIF(s4.[Radiation_Therapy]      != 0, ISNULL(b.[Radiation_Therapy], 0),      0)
        + IIF(s4.[Cardiac_Services]       != 0, ISNULL(b.[Cardiac_Services], 0),       0)
        + IIF(s4.[Chemotherapy]           != 0, ISNULL(b.[Chemotherapy], 0),           0)
        + IIF(s4.[Sleep_Studies]          != 0, ISNULL(b.[Sleep_Studies], 0),          0)
        + IIF(s4.[IV_Therapy]             != 0, ISNULL(b.[IV_Therapy], 0),             0)
        + IIF(s4.[Miscellaneous]          != 0, ISNULL(b.[Miscellaneous], 0),          0)
        + IIF(s4.[Drugs]                  != 0, ISNULL(b.[Drugs], 0),                  0)
        + IIF(s4.[Implants]               != 0, ISNULL(b.[Implants], 0),               0)
        + IIF(s4.[Blood]                  != 0, ISNULL(b.[Blood], 0),                  0)
        + IIF(s4.[Blood_Processing]       != 0, ISNULL(b.[Blood_Processing], 0),       0)
        + IIF(s4.[OP_Default]             != 0, ISNULL(b.[OP_Default], 0),             0)
        -- PT/OT/ST Therapy slot pivot: each line gets its own rank's slot value from the rank-1 row
        + IIF(s4.[PT/OT/ST] != 0,
              CASE b.rn_Therapy
                WHEN 1  THEN ISNULL(rd.Therapy1,  0)
                WHEN 2  THEN ISNULL(rd.Therapy2,  0)
                WHEN 3  THEN ISNULL(rd.Therapy3,  0)
                WHEN 4  THEN ISNULL(rd.Therapy4,  0)
                WHEN 5  THEN ISNULL(rd.Therapy5,  0)
                WHEN 6  THEN ISNULL(rd.Therapy6,  0)
                WHEN 7  THEN ISNULL(rd.Therapy7,  0)
                WHEN 8  THEN ISNULL(rd.Therapy8,  0)
                WHEN 9  THEN ISNULL(rd.Therapy9,  0)
                WHEN 10 THEN ISNULL(rd.Therapy10, 0)
                ELSE 0
              END, 0)
        -- Radiology slot pivot
        + IIF(s4.[Radiology/MRI/CT_Scan_Reduction] != 0,
              CASE b.rn_RD
                WHEN 1  THEN ISNULL(rd.RD1,  0)
                WHEN 2  THEN ISNULL(rd.RD2,  0)
                WHEN 3  THEN ISNULL(rd.RD3,  0)
                WHEN 4  THEN ISNULL(rd.RD4,  0)
                WHEN 5  THEN ISNULL(rd.RD5,  0)
                WHEN 6  THEN ISNULL(rd.RD6,  0)
                WHEN 7  THEN ISNULL(rd.RD7,  0)
                WHEN 8  THEN ISNULL(rd.RD8,  0)
                WHEN 9  THEN ISNULL(rd.RD9,  0)
                WHEN 10 THEN ISNULL(rd.RD10, 0)
                ELSE 0
              END, 0)
        + IIF(s4.[Radiology/MRI/CT_Scan_NoReduction] != 0, ISNULL(b.[Radiology/MRI/CT_Scan_NoReduction], 0), 0)
        -- MRI/CT slot pivot
        + IIF(s4.[MRI/CT_Reduction] != 0,
              CASE b.rn_RDC
                WHEN 1  THEN ISNULL(rd.RDC1,  0)
                WHEN 2  THEN ISNULL(rd.RDC2,  0)
                WHEN 3  THEN ISNULL(rd.RDC3,  0)
                WHEN 4  THEN ISNULL(rd.RDC4,  0)
                WHEN 5  THEN ISNULL(rd.RDC5,  0)
                WHEN 6  THEN ISNULL(rd.RDC6,  0)
                WHEN 7  THEN ISNULL(rd.RDC7,  0)
                WHEN 8  THEN ISNULL(rd.RDC8,  0)
                WHEN 9  THEN ISNULL(rd.RDC9,  0)
                WHEN 10 THEN ISNULL(rd.RDC10, 0)
                ELSE 0
              END, 0)
        + IIF(s4.[MRI/CT_noReduction] != 0, ISNULL(b.[MRI/CT_noReduction], 0), 0)
      , 2)

    -- NCCI BUNDLED FLAG: 1 = this line was zeroed/flagged by NCCI bundling in #Step3Bundle
    , [BundledByNCCI] = CAST(b.[NeedsCorrectedClaim] AS TINYINT)

INTO #LineBreakdown
FROM bRanked b
INNER JOIN #Step4  s4 ON s4.[EncounterID] = b.[EncounterID]
LEFT  JOIN bSlots  rd ON rd.[EncounterID] = b.[EncounterID]
ORDER BY b.[EncounterID], b.[Sequence];

insertion_plan.description: Price_Breakdown_Detail correlated subquery as the last column in the FINAL_JOIN SELECT (#Step7), placed immediately before the INTO #Step7 clause
insertion_plan.sql:
, [Price_Breakdown_Detail] = (
		SELECT STRING_AGG(
			'Seq:'  + CAST(lb.[Sequence]      AS VARCHAR(MAX)) +
			' CPT:' + ISNULL(CAST(lb.[ProcedureCode] AS VARCHAR(MAX)), '') +
			' Rev:' + ISNULL(CAST(lb.[RevenueCode]   AS VARCHAR(MAX)), '') +
			' | Cat:'     + CAST(lb.[ServiceCategory]  AS VARCHAR(MAX)) +
			' | Billed:$' + CAST(CONVERT(DECIMAL(12,2), ISNULL(lb.[BilledAmount], 0)) AS VARCHAR(MAX)) +
			' | Paid:$'   + CAST(CONVERT(DECIMAL(12,2), ISNULL(lb.[LinePayment],   0)) AS VARCHAR(MAX)) +
			CASE WHEN lb.[BundledByNCCI] = 1 THEN ' [NCCI-BUNDLED]' ELSE '' END
		, ' || ')
		WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY lb.[Sequence])
		FROM #LineBreakdown lb
		WHERE lb.[EncounterID] = x.[EncounterID]
	)

insertion_plan.description: Auditor Query 1 (full line-level detail SELECT from #LineBreakdown) + Query 2 (reconciliation: SUM(LinePayment) per encounter vs #Step5.Price, showing discrepancies > $1.00)
insertion_plan.sql:
--======================================================================
-- *** [AUDITOR PRICE BREAKDOWN SUMMARY QUERIES - INSERTED SECTION] ***
-- Run after the main script completes.
-- #LineBreakdown = one row per charge line (EncounterID + Sequence + ProcedureCode).
-- ServiceCategory = final hierarchy decision applied per #Step4.
-- 'Suppressed_By_Hierarchy' = line matched a category but a higher-tier
--   category won for this encounter.
-- 'No_Payment_Category' = line matched no pricing pattern at all.
--======================================================================

-- QUERY 1: Full line-level detail.
-- Use to trace how each CPT/Rev Code was categorized and priced,
-- and which lines were suppressed or NCCI-bundled.
SELECT
    lb.[EncounterID]
    , lb.[Sequence]
    , lb.[ProcedureCode]
    , lb.[RevenueCode]
    , lb.[ServiceDate]
    , lb.[BilledAmount]
    , lb.[Quantity]
    , lb.[ServiceCategory]
    , lb.[PricingMethod]
    , lb.[LinePayment]       AS [ContractualPayment_Line]
    , lb.[BundledByNCCI]     AS [ZeroedByNCCI_Flag]
FROM #LineBreakdown lb
ORDER BY lb.[EncounterID], lb.[Sequence];


-- QUERY 2: Reconciliation — line-level SUM vs encounter-level Price.
-- Rows returned indicate a mismatch that must be investigated.
-- In a correctly generated breakdown this query should return 0 rows.
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS #recon_temp;

SELECT
    lb.[EncounterID]
    , SUM(lb.[LinePayment]) AS LineBreakdown_Total
INTO #recon_temp
FROM #LineBreakdown lb
GROUP BY lb.[EncounterID];

SELECT
    r.[EncounterID]
    , r.[LineBreakdown_Total]
    , p.[Price]             AS EncounterLevel_Price
    , (r.[LineBreakdown_Total] - p.[Price]) AS Discrepancy
FROM #recon_temp r
INNER JOIN #Step5 p
    ON r.[EncounterID] = p.[EncounterID]
WHERE ABS(r.[LineBreakdown_Total] - p.[Price]) > 1.00
ORDER BY ABS(r.[LineBreakdown_Total] - p.[Price]) DESC;
